questions.question:
A DaemonSet named `log-agent` in namespace `daemonset-lab` is not covering the intended Linux nodes.

Fix the workload so that:
- the DaemonSet keeps name `log-agent`
- it targets Linux nodes with `nodeSelector kubernetes.io/os=linux`
- it keeps `updateStrategy.type: RollingUpdate`
- the DaemonSet becomes Ready
- every desired DaemonSet pod is Running

Do not delete the DaemonSet, do not cordon nodes, and do not convert the workload into a Deployment.

verification.description: DaemonSet log-agent uses the intended Linux node selector and RollingUpdate strategy
DaemonSet log-agent becomes Ready after the Linux node coverage repair
Every desired DaemonSet pod is Running after the repair
